description_long: This office building features a blocky, geometric design with a strong emphasis on rectilinear forms and modular elements. The facade is punctuated by large, blue-tinted windows arranged in horizontal and vertical bands, interspersed with beige and gray wall panels. Several sections of the building display stylized signage and abstract patterns in red, blue, and white, adding visual interest and a sense of corporate branding. Staircases and terraces are integrated into the exterior, suggesting multiple access points and communal spaces. The roofline is varied, with raised platforms and mechanical structures visible, typical of urban office buildings. The overall appearance is modern and functional, with a hint of playful, pixel-art-inspired aesthetics.
description: A modern, blocky office building with blue-tinted windows, beige and gray panels, and colorful signage. The structure features geometric forms, integrated staircases, and a varied roofline.
description_view_0: This view highlights a large blue window section, a prominent pink and gray signage panel, and a mix of horizontal and vertical window bands.
description_view_1: This side shows a stepped terrace, multiple narrow vertical windows, and a rooftop mechanical structure with a red and white pattern.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals a wide array of windows, a large red and white abstract sign, and a stepped roof with terraces.
description_view_3: This angle displays a grid of small windows, a large gray panel with a blue '4', and colorful vertical signage elements.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced horizontal and vertical bands of rectangular windows, with some grouped in grids and others as single large panes.
